name: instrument-profiles
description: Stage 1 (pre-hardware): lay down the PWI4 (.cfg) + PHD2 (.reg) instrument profile TEMPLATES. PWI4 site location (Latitude/Longitude/HeightMeters) is injected from the deployed C:\WIS\unit.toml [location] (written by config-bootstrap, order 150); fleet-constant values (focuser CountsPerMicron, mount ConnectionMethod=usb, internal IPs, equatorial) ship verbatim from MAST02. Artifacts are staged under C:\ProgramData\MAST\instrument-profiles and applied into the mast user's profile (PWI4 Settings dir + HKCU PHD2 profiles) by an AtLogon scheduled task, because the per-user mast profile is not materialized at provisioning time. Per-unit device->COM binding (EFA, PWBus) is NOT done here -- it is the post-hardware tools/calibrate-instruments.ps1 step (Stage 2); the Elmo mount needs no COM (PWI4 auto-detects it over USB). Runs at order 1850, after PWI4 (planewave 1700), PHD2 (1400) and the ZWO camera (1800) and after config-bootstrap (150).
